name: init
description: Initialize a new paper trading account. Must be called before any other commands for that account. Creates an append-only event log and sets the initial balance for PnL calculations.

account.description: Account identifier slug (e.g., 'main', 'trading-algo-1'). Use consistent value across all commands for the same account.

name.description: Human-readable account name for display in reports (e.g., 'Main Paper Account')

base-currency.description: Three-letter currency code for PnL reporting (e.g., USD, EUR)

starting-balance.description: Initial cash balance in base-currency units (e.g., 10000 for $10,000)

db.description: Optional path to SQLite database file (default: ~/.openclaw/paper-trading.db)

name: snapshot
description: Log a market price snapshot for a symbol. Required for status command to calculate unrealized PnL. Run this before status when you have open positions. Do not use for closed positions.

symbol.description: Trading symbol in uppercase (e.g., BTC, ETH, SOL)

mint.description: Token contract address (required). For DEX tokens use wrapped addresses: WETH, WBTC, cbBTC. Must match the mint used when opening the position.

price.description: Current market price in base-currency units (e.g., 62000 for $62,000)

db.description: Optional path to SQLite database file (default: ~/.openclaw/paper-trading.db)

name: open
description: Open a new long or short position. Use this to start tracking a trade. Supports stop-loss, take-profit, and maximum risk percentage. Requires the account to be initialized first. Do not use for paper-trading ideas without actual entry signals.

account.description: Account identifier slug (must match an initialized account)

symbol.description: Trading symbol in uppercase (e.g., BTC, ETH)

mint.description: Token contract address (required). Use wrapped token address for DEX assets: WETH, WBTC/cbBTC.

side.description: Position direction: LONG for buy, SHORT for sell

qty.description: Position size in asset units (e.g., 0.1 for 0.1 BTC)

fee.description: Trading fee in base-currency units (e.g., 4 for $4)

stop-price.description: Stop-loss price in base-currency units (optional but recommended)

take-price.description: Take-profit price in base-currency units (optional but recommended)

max-risk-pct.description: Maximum risk as percentage of account balance (e.g., 1.5 for 1.5%). Optional but recommended.

db.description: Optional path to SQLite database file (default: ~/.openclaw/paper-trading.db)

name: set_levels
description: Update stop-loss and take-profit levels for an existing position. Use this to adjust risk management as the trade evolves. If multiple positions exist for the same symbol, provide mint to target the correct one.

mint.description: Token contract address. Required if multiple positions exist for the same symbol.

side.description: Position direction (must match the existing position side)

stop-price.description: New stop-loss price in base-currency units

take-price.description: New take-profit price in base-currency units

db.description: Optional path to SQLite database file (default: ~/.openclaw/paper-trading.db)

name: close
description: Close or partially close an existing position. Use this to realize profits or losses. The qty parameter determines full vs partial close. If multiple positions exist for the same symbol, provide mint to target the correct one.

mint.description: Token contract address. Required if multiple positions exist for the same symbol.

side.description: Position direction (must match the existing position side)

qty.description: Quantity to close in asset units. Use full position qty for complete close, or less for partial close.

db.description: Optional path to SQLite database file (default: ~/.openclaw/paper-trading.db)

name: note
description: Add a timestamped journal note to a position. Use this to record thesis updates, risk assessments, or market observations. Notes become immutable events for later review. Do not use for trade execution commands.

note.description: Journal entry text (e.g., 'Invalidation if daily close < 61000')

tags.description: Array of tag strings for categorization (e.g., ['thesis', 'risk', 'macro']). Optional.

db.description: Optional path to SQLite database file (default: ~/.openclaw/paper-trading.db)

name: status
description: Show current portfolio status including all open positions, realized PnL, and unrealized PnL. Run this after opening positions to verify entry. Run a snapshot first for accurate unrealized PnL. Do not use for historical performance analysis (use review instead).

format.description: Output format: 'text' for human-readable, 'json' for programmatic parsing

pretty.description: Whether to pretty-print JSON output (only applies when format is 'json')

db.description: Optional path to SQLite database file (default: ~/.openclaw/paper-trading.db)

name: review
description: Generate a weekly performance summary. Use this at the end of each trading week to review performance metrics including trade count, win rate, realized PnL, and position breakdown. Do not use for real-time position checking (use status instead).

format.description: Output format: 'text' for human-readable, 'json' for programmatic parsing

pretty.description: Whether to pretty-print JSON output (only applies when format is 'json')

db.description: Optional path to SQLite database file (default: ~/.openclaw/paper-trading.db)
